description: Create complete backend CRUD for Mess Management, Maintenance, Visitors, Notices, and Events - all five new modules with Entity, DTO, Mapper, Repository, Service, and Controller layers following existing patterns exactly.
steps: Create MessMenu entity at backend/src/main/java/com/hostel/entity/MessMenu.java with fields: id, day (enum MON/TUE/WED/THU/FRI/SAT/SUN), mealType (enum BREAKFAST/LUNCH/DINNER/SNACKS), items (String), specialNote, isActive (boolean default true), effectiveFrom (LocalDate), effectiveTo (LocalDate), createdAt, updatedAt. Follow Student.java pattern with @PrePersist/@PreUpdate.

Create MaintenanceRequest entity at backend/src/main/java/com/hostel/entity/MaintenanceRequest.java with fields: id, title, description, roomNumber, category (enum PLUMBING/ELECTRICAL/FURNITURE/CLEANING/OTHER), priority (enum LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL), status (enum OPEN/ASSIGNED/IN_PROGRESS/COMPLETED/REJECTED), reportedBy, assignedTo (nullable), reportedDate (LocalDate), completedDate (LocalDate nullable), estimatedCost (BigDecimal nullable), notes, createdAt, updatedAt.

Create Visitor entity at backend/src/main/java/com/hostel/entity/Visitor.java with fields: id, visitorName, relation (enum PARENT/SIBLING/FRIEND/RELATIVE/GUARDIAN/OTHER), student (ManyToOne FK to Student), purpose, phoneNumber, idProof (String), checkInTime (LocalDateTime), checkOutTime (LocalDateTime nullable), status (enum CHECKED_IN/CHECKED_OUT/REJECTED), approvedBy (nullable), notes, createdAt.

Create Notice entity at backend/src/main/java/com/hostel/entity/Notice.java with fields: id, title, content (TEXT), category (enum GENERAL/ACADEMIC/HOSTEL/EMERGENCY/EVENT), priority (enum LOW/NORMAL/HIGH/URGENT), publishedBy, publishedAt (LocalDateTime), expiresAt (LocalDateTime nullable), isActive (boolean default true), targetAudience (enum ALL/STUDENTS/STAFF/WARDENS), createdAt, updatedAt.

Create Event entity at backend/src/main/java/com/hostel/entity/Event.java with fields: id, title, description, eventDate (LocalDate), startTime (LocalTime), endTime (LocalTime), venue, organizer, category (enum CULTURAL/SPORTS/ACADEMIC/SOCIAL/OTHER), status (enum UPCOMING/ONGOING/COMPLETED/CANCELLED), maxParticipants (Integer nullable), registeredCount (Integer default 0), createdAt, updatedAt.

Create DTOs for all five entities: MessMenuDTO.java, MaintenanceRequestDTO.java, VisitorDTO.java, NoticeDTO.java, EventDTO.java in backend/src/main/java/com/hostel/dto/. Use String for all date/time fields (consistent with StudentDTO pattern). Include @NotBlank on required fields.

Create Mappers for all five entities: MessMenuMapper.java, MaintenanceRequestMapper.java, VisitorMapper.java, NoticeMapper.java, EventMapper.java in backend/src/main/java/com/hostel/mapper/. Use @Mapper(componentModel='spring', uses=CommonConverters.class, builder=@Builder(disableBuilder=true)). Include toDto, toEntity, updateEntityFromDto methods with proper @Mapping annotations for date conversions and enum handling.

Create Repositories for all five entities: MessMenuRepository.java, MaintenanceRequestRepository.java, VisitorRepository.java, NoticeRepository.java, EventRepository.java in backend/src/main/java/com/hostel/repository/. Add filter methods: MessMenu findByDay/findByMealType, MaintenanceRequest findByStatus/findByPriority/findByCategory, Visitor findByStatus/findByCheckInTimeBetween, Notice findByIsActiveTrue/findByCategory, Event findByEventDateBetween/findByStatus. Add count methods needed for analytics.

Create Services for all five entities: MessMenuService.java, MaintenanceRequestService.java, VisitorService.java, NoticeService.java, EventService.java in backend/src/main/java/com/hostel/service/. Follow StudentService pattern with constructor injection, @Transactional, mapper delegation. Include special operations: Maintenance status transitions, Visitor check-in/check-out workflow.

Create Controllers for all five entities: MessMenuController.java at /api/mess, MaintenanceRequestController.java at /api/maintenance, VisitorController.java at /api/visitors, NoticeController.java at /api/notices, EventController.java at /api/events in backend/src/main/java/com/hostel/controller/. Support GET (list with filters + pagination), GET/{id}, POST, PUT/{id}, DELETE/{id}. Add PUT /api/visitors/{id}/checkout for visitor checkout. All return ResponseEntity<ApiResponse<T>>.
Add LocalTime conversion methods to CommonConverters.java: stringToLocalTime and localTimeToString (needed for Event entity startTime/endTime).
acceptance_criteria: All five entity classes compile with Lombok annotations generating getters/setters/builders
All five mapper interfaces compile and MapStruct generates implementations with proper date/enum conversion
All five controllers expose REST endpoints with ApiResponse wrapper
Backend compiles successfully with mvn compile -DskipTests
Visitor entity has ManyToOne relationship to Student
MaintenanceRequest supports status transition via standard PUT
All enums are defined as inner classes of their respective entities
findings: Compilation requires Java 17 (not the default Java 25 in this environment). Use: export JAVA_HOME=/opt/toolchains/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17.0.2 && export PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH before running mvn compile. All 5 modules compile successfully with MapStruct annotation processing generating implementations.
